ddls:
CREATE TABLE "prizes" (
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prize */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the Nobel Prize */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Name of the Nobel Prize */,
  "motivation" TEXT /* Motivation for awarding the prize */,
  "prize_share" TEXT /* Share of the prize awarded to the laureate(s) */,
  "nomination_count" INTEGER /* Number of nominations for the prize */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureates" (
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laureate */,
  "laureate_type" TEXT /* Type of laureate (Individual/Organization) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the laureate */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the laureate */,
  "birth_city" TEXT /* City of birth of the laureate */,
  "birth_country" TEXT /* Country of birth of the laureate */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the laureate */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the laureate */,
  "death_city" TEXT /* City of death of the laureate */,
  "death_country" TEXT /* Country of death of the laureate */,
  "bio_summary" TEXT /* Brief biography of the laureate */,
  "nationality_at_award" TEXT /* Laureate's nationality at the time of the award */,
  "current_nationality" TEXT /* Laureate's current nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "organization_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "organization_city" TEXT /* City where the organization is based */,
  "organization_country" TEXT /* Country where the organization is based */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization */,
  "organization_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_prizes" (
  "laureate_prize_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a laureate and a prize */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "prize_share_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the prize awarded to the laureate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_prizes_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_prizes_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "decades" (
  "decade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each decade */,
  "decade" TEXT /* The decade in which prizes were awarded */,
  "female_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if there was a female winner in that decade */,
  "prize_count" INTEGER /* Number of prizes awarded in that decade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("decade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laureate_organizations" (
  "laureate_organization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a laureate and an organization */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "organization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laureate_organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_organizations_organization_id FOREIGN KEY ("organization_id") REFERENCES organizations ("organization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_laureate_organizations_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "nomination_year" INTEGER /* Year the laureate was nominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prize_categories" (
  "prize_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prize_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ceremonies" (
  "ceremony_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ceremony */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "ceremony_date" TEXT /* Date of the award ceremony */,
  "ceremony_location" TEXT /* Location of the award ceremony */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ceremony_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ceremonies_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "prize_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prize */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "prize_year" INTEGER /* Year the prize was awarded */,
  "prize_category" TEXT /* Category of the prize */,
  "female_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates if the laureate was female */,
  "prize_count" INTEGER /* Number of prizes awarded in that category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_prize_id FOREIGN KEY ("prize_id") REFERENCES prizes ("prize_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic */,
  "laureate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laureate */,
  "age_at_award" INTEGER /* Age of the laureate at the time of the award */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the laureate */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the laureate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_laureate_id FOREIGN KEY ("laureate_id") REFERENCES laureates ("laureate_id")
)
